seoTitle: Donovans vs Dover Gardens — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Donovans and Dover Gardens. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Donovans vs Dover Gardens: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Donovans and Dover Gardens.
heading: Donovans vs Dover Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Donovans, South Australia and Dover Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Donovans has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Dover Gardens (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Donovans or Dover Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Donovans has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Dover Gardens scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Donovans scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Dover Gardens scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Donovans or Dover Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Donovans has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
